about.title: About Gradify
about.subtitle: Gradify is an AI-powered learning and progress tracking platform designed to help students learn smarter, track performance, and achieve academic excellence.
about.missionDesc: To simplify and enhance the learning experience through structured course management, real-time progress tracking, and intelligent AI assistance.
about.visionDesc: To create a next-generation digital learning ecosystem where students receive personalized insights and institutions gain meaningful academic analytics.
about.feature1Desc: Our AI tutor understands course modules and student progress to provide relevant guidance.
about.feature2Desc: Modular course design with lessons, assignments, quizzes, and real-time updates.
about.feature3Desc: Dashboard insights including streaks, analytics, attendance, and skill tracking.
